siteTitle: Nexus Web Tools — Free Online Calculators & Unit Converters
heroDesc: Nexus Web Tools is a growing hub of fast, free, no-nonsense calculators and utilities. Every tool runs instantly in your browser — no sign-up, no install, mobile-friendly.
cardConcreteDesc: Volume, bags, mix ratios, saw-cut spacing and concrete on graded land. Metric & imperial.
cardCompoundDesc: Future value with regular contributions, any compounding frequency, plus a multi-scenario comparison tool.
cardMortgageDesc: Calculate monthly mortgage repayments, total interest, and amortisation schedules for any home loan.
cardSCurveDesc: Project progress tracking, earned value management, cash flow forecasting, and resource planning.
cardUnitDesc: Convert between 40+ unit categories — length, weight, temperature, area, volume, speed and more.
